name: AI-IO low-dynamic rotor RPM selection
note: Low-dynamic rows select samples by ground-truth speed, ground-truth velocity derivative magnitude, and calibrated gyro norm. These are slow-flight proxies, not controlled hover thrust-stand measurements.
Slow, low-acceleration, low-rotation samples; closest automatic proxy for hover-like steady flight in the extracted AI-IO test slices.
Broader slow-flight proxy that keeps more samples while still excluding the most aggressive translational and rotational motion.
